0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"AAAK Compression"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Adaptive Associative Abstraction Kernel (AAAK) is Mnemosyne's text substitution system for reducing memory content size. It is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," a method on the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Memory"}]," class — it is a standalone utility used during consolidation."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Problem"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. AAAK applies deterministic text substitutions to compress related memories into shorter representations."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How AAAK Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"encode()"}]," function performs text substitution in three passes:"]}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Category prefixes"}],": Replaces verbose category labels with short tokens (e.g., ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"conversation:\""}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"conv:\""}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Phrase compression"}],": Substitutes common phrases with abbreviated forms"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Structural"}],": Normalizes whitespace, removes redundant formatting"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Compression Ratios"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["AAAK achieves approximately ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"30–50%"}]," text reduction:"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Content Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Original"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Compressed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Reduction"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1,000 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~600 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~40%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Documentation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"800 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~500 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~38%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Mixed content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1,200 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~700 chars"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~42%"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Actual ratios vary by content. AAAK is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"lossy"}]," — some detail is sacrificed for brevity."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Using AAAK"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.aaak import encode\n\n# Encode (compress) text\ncompressed = encode(original_text)\n\n# The result is a shorter string, not a separate object\nprint(f\"Original: {len(original_text)} chars\")\nprint(f\"Compressed: {len(compressed)} chars\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"During Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"AAAK is applied automatically during sleep consolidation when summarizing groups of Working Memory entries:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  WM[Working Memory Entries] -->|group by source| G[Grouped]\n  G -->|encode via AAAK| C[Compressed Summary]\n  C -->|promote| EM[Episodic Memory]\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Important Notes"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"encode()"}]," is one-way"]}],": There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"decode()"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"expand()"}]," function. Once compressed, the original text is not recoverable from the output alone."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Not a Memory method"}],": AAAK is a standalone module, not called via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.compress()"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.expand()"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Used during consolidation"}],": Applied by the sleep consolidation pipeline to compress summaries before promoting to Episodic Memory."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":["$L5","$L6"]}]}]],["$L7"],"$L8"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"u2pr-APo4MhK-J-xpY1ml"}
5:["$","$L9",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}]
6:["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Lossy Compression"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"AAAK is lossy — fine details may be lost during compression. Critical facts should be stored in Semantic Memory (which is not compressed) or marked with high importance to preserve detail."}]}]]}]
